title: zNether
description: Pleasant sounds and textures for late-night Netherite farming.
body:
**More pleasant sounds and textures. Perfect for late-night Netherite farming.**

---

For the best experience, it's recommended to turn off Block broken/breaking Particles in the [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) settings.

## Changes

**Block Textures**
- Ancient Debris
- Basalt
- Blackstone
- Gravel
- Magma
- Nether Ores
- Netherrack
- Soul Sand

**Block Sounds**
- Ancient Debris
- Gravel
- Nether Ores
- Netherrack

**Player Sounds**
- Experience Orb
- Fire Hurt
- Item Pickup
- Levelup

**Mob Sounds**
- Ghast
